items.title: Email and content moderation
items.description: Classifiers trained on millions of labeled messages learn spam, phishing, and abuse patterns—scaling to new attack variants faster than manual rule lists.

items.title: Credit and fraud risk scoring
items.description: Banks fit models on transaction history and applicant features to estimate default or fraud probability, updating scores as new labeled outcomes arrive.

items.title: Medical image triage
items.description: Radiology models learn from annotated scans to flag likely pathologies, prioritizing cases for human review while clinicians retain final diagnosis.

items.title: Demand forecasting in retail
items.description: Time-series and regression models learn seasonal patterns from past sales and promotions to predict inventory needs per store and SKU.

items.title: Large language model fine-tuning
items.description: Gen AI products adapt base models on domain-specific prompt-response pairs so assistants learn company tone and task formats from data rather than hard-coded templates.
